title: Luscious Tunisian Asparagus Fritters
description: Resinous, fluffy, festive fritters that double-fry the crispness of white asparagus with a savory chickpea flour batter, perfect for a vegetarian snack.
instructions: Trim the ends of the white asparagus and cut into 2 cm pieces.
Roughly chop parsley and zest lemon, set aside.
In a bowl mix flour, chickpea flour, baking powder, salt, pepper, paprika, garlic powder.
Beat water into dry mixture until smooth batter forms.
Stir in asparagus pieces, parsley, and lemon zest until coated.
Heat oil in a deep pan to 180°C.
Drop spoonfuls of coated asparagus into hot oil and fry until golden, about 3 minutes.
Remove fritters and drain on paper towels.
Increase oil temperature to 190°C for second fry.
Return fritters to oil and fry another 2 minutes for extra crispness.
Drain on paper towels again, serve hot with a squeeze of lemon.
